## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] Local gate passes (lint / typecheck or fmt + clippy + test / build)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Behavioural changes are documented in the README where relevant
